main.description: A grounded region on a photo (the panproto 'grounds' target). Supports bounding boxes, rotated boxes, polygons, raster/RLE masks, points, keypoints, and 3D cuboids so any CV output can attach to a scene node.

photo.description: A photo (AT-URI) or app.graycard.artifact grounded onto.

geometry.description: Open geometry for kinds not covered by bbox/rbox: polygon `points:[[x,y],...]`, multipolygon `polygons:[[[x,y],...],...]`, RLE `rle:{size:[h,w],counts}`, keypoints `keypoints:[[x,y,v],...]`, cuboid corners, etc. Coordinates normalized [0,1] scaled by 1e6 unless the `format` says otherwise.

format.description: Source encoding hint for consumers, e.g. coco-polygon, coco-rle, yolo-obb, sam-mask, sam2-masklet, labelme-polygon, graycard-polygon.
